rule: TFDA dosage form + approved oral route are required; product name and indication never decide inclusion.
Ready-to-use and reconstituted oral liquids use the specified normalized groups.
Only TFDA official main-active summary is a confirmed active; excipients are never inferred as active.
No concentration is guessed; all lack role-labelled detail are queued as unclear.
Therapeutic classes use multi-signal active/indication rules and retain multiple classes.
